rulings.Case Title: KAZIM Z ACAR VS. JENNIFER E CRANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant And Cross-Complainant Jennifer Cranes Motion To Compel Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Kazim Acar To Provide Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 04, 2015, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT and Cross Complainant JENNIFER CRANE's Motion To Compel Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Kazim Acar To Provide Discovery Responses And For Sanctions GRANTED. Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in full. Plaintiff's motion to compel is not properly before the Court procedurally and substantively. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 04, 2015, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANTS SANDEEP HINGORANI, URSULA HINGORANI and PIPER DAVIES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued January 12, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition no later than December 18, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
